metadata.institution: MSAJCE — Mohamed Sathak A.J. College of Engineering
metadata.purpose: High-priority ground truth for global counts to prevent RAG fragmentation

alumni_scholarships.strategic_summary: As of May 2026, the MSAJCE Alumni Association has sponsored a total of 97 students with scholarships worth Rs. 37.94 Lakhs. This support covers all major engineering departments and batches from 2018 to 2029.

academic_scope.faculty_publications: 13+ books authored by Principal Dr. K.S. Srinivasan
